case_title: ARMANDO HERNANDEZ VS. 20 MISSION INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, ARMANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 20 MISSION INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $17,855.23 PRINCIPAL, $184.10 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,409.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER OF EXAMINATION APR-09-2014 DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PER LOCAL RULE 8.9 (E) AS TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR JERED KENNA, 20 MISSION INC. JUDGMENT CREDITOR ARMANDO HERNANDEZ APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. PIERRE G. BASMAJI, ESQ., APPEARING FOR JUDGMENT DEBTOR 20 MISSION INC. OEX DISCHARGED ON ORDER OF THE COURT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
